site.title: SkillBase — Multi-Agent AI Skill Management Tool
site.description: SkillBase is a cross-platform AI Agent skill management center. Seamlessly manage and sync SKILL.md across Claude, OpenAI Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Windsurf, Qoder, and more.

hero.title: Manage SKILL.md Across All AI Agents
hero.subtitle: Sync skills across Claude, Cursor, OpenCode, Windsurf & more
hero.description: Install, uninstall, sync, and manage AI agent skill files from one desktop app. No more scattered configuration — everything in one place.

features.title: Core Features
features.subtitle: One tool to manage AI skills for all your agents

install.title: Install & Uninstall
install.desc: Install or remove SKILL.md skills with one click. Automatically syncs to all configured agent directories.

scan.title: Smart Scanning
scan.desc: Automatically discover SKILL.md files across all agent paths. Detect new skills, resolve conflicts, and remove duplicates.

security.title: Security Check
security.desc: Built-in format and security assessment for every skill. Know what's safe to use before you install.

sync.title: Multi-Agent Sync
sync.desc: Install once, sync to all your agents. Share best practices across Claude, Cursor, OpenCode, and more.

agents.title: Supported AI Agents
agents.subtitle: Manage skills for all major AI coding assistants
agents.customNote: Also supports custom paths — configure skills directory for any agent

claude.name: Claude Code
claude.desc: Manage Claude Code SKILL.md files installed to ~/.claude/skills/

cursor.name: Cursor
cursor.desc: Manage Cursor custom instructions and rules

custom.name: Custom Agent
custom.desc: Custom path support — configure skills directory for any agent

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.subtitle: Clean, intuitive interface design

download.title: Download SkillBase
download.subtitle: Free and open source. Available for macOS, Windows, and Linux.

items.a: SKILL.md is an AI skill format defined by Claude Code, providing domain knowledge and instructions to AI coding assistants. SkillBase manages these skill files and syncs them across multiple agents.

items.q: Which AI agents does SkillBase support?
items.a: SkillBase supports Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Windsurf, Qoder, and other major AI coding assistants. We continuously add support for more agents.

items.q: How do I sync skills between multiple agents?
items.a: After installing SkillBase, add your agent paths. When you install a skill, it automatically syncs to all configured agent directories — no manual copying needed.

items.q: Does SkillBase modify my skill files?
items.a: No. SkillBase creates mappings between your agent directories and the local skill library, leaving original files intact.
Yes, SkillBase is completely free and open source.
Simply delete the app. All data is stored in ~/.skillbase — clean it up manually if needed.
